seo_content:
Traders Launch Technical Infrastructure

Traders Launch, based in the United States and established in August 2023, is a futures proprietary trading firm offering a single Futures Evaluation 1-step program available in two sub-types: Full and NYC (New York Close). Each sub-type is offered with a choice of 80% or 55% profit split, making the split part of the product selection rather than a performance-based upgrade. Account sizes range from $100,000 to $300,000. Four platforms are supported: Quantower, Volumetrica Trading, IBKR, and NinjaTrader. No coupon code is currently published; discounts are reflected in listed prices.

The Full 80% 1-step program covers three sizes: $100,000 at $135.15 (original $159.00), $200,000 at $254.15 (original $299.00), and $300,000 at $509.15 (original $599.00). The Full 55% 1-step is listed at $200,000 for $126.65 (original $149.00) and $300,000 for $254.15 (original $299.00). The NYC 80% 1-step is available at $100,000 for $84.15 (original $99.00) and $200,000 for $126.65 (original $149.00). The NYC 55% 1-step covers three sizes: $100,000 at $41.65 (original $49.00), $200,000 at $62.90 (original $74.00), and $300,000 at $118.15 (original $139.00). Payments are accepted via Credit/Debit Card and Crypto.

Four platforms are supported: Quantower, Volumetrica Trading, IBKR, and NinjaTrader. All instruments are futures-based; no specific leverage or contract specification data is published. News trading is permitted with no stated restriction. Weekend holding policy is not specified. After passing the evaluation, traders transition to a live brokerage account with IBKR, NinjaTrader, or T3 Global — a notable operational distinction from most simulated-funded models.

The profit split is either 80% or 55% depending on the program variant selected at purchase. A 1% buffer growth is required before the first withdrawal can be requested. The minimum payout is $100. There is no stated maximum payout cap per transaction, with confirmed transactions ranging from $100 to $50,000. Bank Wire withdrawals are processed within a 3-day window; Crypto withdrawals are available every day. Payout methods are Bank Wire Transfer and Crypto. Funded accounts are paused if the trader fails to place at least one trade per month.

Traders Launch requires a minimum of one trade per week during the evaluation phase. Funded accounts must maintain at least one trade per month to remain active. EAs are permitted but require pre-approval before use. Copy trading is allowed via the Volumetrica Trade Copier. General trading rules apply per the firm terms and conditions; specific prohibited practices are documented on the firm website.
